title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Pay off high-interest credit card debt before investing. A guaranteed 20% avoided interest cost is usually better than uncertain market returns.

title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: You can contribute enough to get an employer match, but beyond that prioritize the card balance and build a small emergency fund.

title: How can I improve my credit score?
question_body: Community question about how can i improve my credit score?
answer_body: Pay on time, keep utilization low, avoid unnecessary applications, and check reports for errors.

title: Should I invest in ETFs or individual stocks?
question_body: Community question about should i invest in etfs or individual stocks?
answer_body: For most investors, diversified low-cost ETFs reduce idiosyncratic risk and require less monitoring than individual stocks.

title: What should I do if I think an investment is a scam?
question_body: Community question about what should i do if i think an investment is a scam?
answer_body: Do not send more money. Preserve records, verify registration with regulators, and report the suspected fraud.

title: Is dollar cost averaging better than lump sum investing?
question_body: Community question about is dollar cost averaging better than lump sum investing?
answer_body: Historically lump sum often has higher expected return, but dollar cost averaging can reduce regret and timing risk.
combined_text: Is dollar cost averaging better than lump sum investing? Community question about is dollar cost averaging better than lump sum investing? title: Do I need a financial advisor?
question_body: Community question about do i need a financial advisor?
answer_body: A fee-only fiduciary can help with complex tax, estate or retirement planning. For simple investing, a low-cost index approach may be enough.

title: Should I refinance my mortgage?
question_body: Community question about should i refinance my mortgage?
answer_body: Refinance when the interest savings exceed closing costs and you expect to keep the loan long enough to break even.
